comments.author: @LIFEDECODED-b4b
comments.text: Cuba most beautiful women in the Caribbean, but the country is poor and stuck. Can beauty fix hunger?

comments.author: @hiddenglobe2901
comments.text: This video blew my mind! The contrast between the struggling economy and their world class doctors is unreal. If you had to choose: live without internet or without a reliable power grid, which would you pick?

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: I would choose to live without the internet. A reliable power grid is fundamentally necessary for survival, maintaining cold storage for food and medicine, and operating the medical equipment those doctors rely on. Evaluating local infrastructure like power stability is actually a critical but often ignored factor in international retirement planning.
